codegraph.assessment: Change is test-only, confined to tests/test_nl_string.c. No production source files modified. No public API changes.

notes: Task is test-only: no implementation defects were found; the documented nl_string_ensure_null_terminated behavior already handles all three boundary cases correctly.

Three boundary tests added: (1) zero-length binary string where capacity==0 forces realloc, (2) exact-capacity binary string (capacity==length, no null terminator slack), (3) 5-byte binary string with embedded NUL bytes where ensure_null_terminated must grow by exactly 1 byte.
Each test verifies: nl_string_length before/after, raw byte content including embedded NULs via nl_string_byte_at, and null_terminated flag before (false) and after (true).
All three new tests are registered in main() under the 'Capacity-Boundary Regressions' section.
